name: Piquant Thai Dipping Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Fresh mint leaves, coarsely chopped
1 teaspoon Lime peel, grated or minced
recipeInstructions:
From "Pacific Flavors" by Hugh Carpenter. (Stewart, Tabori and Chang, 1990).
In a small saucepan, combine tomato sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, chili sauce, garlic, mint leaves, and lime peel. Heat over low heat until the mixture begins to simmer. Stir in cornstarch mixed with cold water, gradually thickening the sauce. Allow the sauce to cool for at least 10 minutes before serving. Serve chilled shrimp alongside the dipping sauce.
